useful_deltas.summary: Added append/deduplicate 30-minute and daily underlying archives with capture provenance, overlap accounting, New York DST-safe round trips, fail-closed validation, and strictly prior-session daily warmup features.

Closed the locked densified 8-symbol x 3-structure session-time proxy cycle after 24/24 rows completed, one train row passed both cost axes, and zero passed the complete train plus untouched-holdout conjunction over 60 usable dates.
Replaced stale thin-density coverage with deterministic 60-usable-date locked-rejection semantics and removed redundant intermediate generated snapshots while preserving no-living-leader truth.

critic_findings.finding: F1: axis max_lots reports generic capacity three while the operating posture is one lot.
critic_findings.rationale: The immutable artifact and all current prose explicitly distinguish generic/theoretical capacity from the one-lot operating posture; zero rows passed, no seat or intent exists, and maximum one-lot loss is $223.36. A post-run label rewrite would not change the decision.

critic_findings.finding: F2: the production journal is a first write and does not itself exercise overlapping live captures.
critic_findings.rationale: Accepted as a claim boundary, not a defect: the run reports first-capture new_rows=780/replaced_rows=0 and makes no live multi-capture claim. Unit tests independently exercise append, overlap replacement, journal growth, and mixed-DST round trips.

critic_findings.finding: F3: redundant intermediate income-coverage snapshots were run-created debris.
critic_findings.rationale: Regenerated the canonical run-stamped and LATEST reports with an explicit deterministic stamp, removed 1429/1437/1443 intermediates, and retained a regression test for the claim-current 60-date locked rejection.

critic_findings.finding: F4: zero-trade windows report $75 capital_fit_usd/max_loss_usd theoretical values.
critic_findings.rationale: The $75 value is the simulator's documented theoretical one-point-width estimate when no trade exists, not an observed path loss. n_trades=0 makes gate_pass false, so the field cannot rescue selection or support an empirical-risk claim.

critic_findings.finding: F5: challenger did not rerun platform smoke or the full suite.
critic_findings.rationale: This was a required finalizer verification step rather than a code defect. The finalizer independently reran focused 31/31, platform smoke, and full 201/201 successfully.

critic_findings.finding: F6: executor NEXT is a completed phase handoff rather than the post-run BUILD seed.
critic_findings.rationale: The executor handoff remains correct historical phase evidence. Final merge, LATEST, readiness, learning, and compounding surfaces supersede it with one free defined-risk multi-structure discovery seed while keeping the densified family closed.

data_dependencies: Observed historical option surfaces with complete entry/exit joins remain required for any claim above L0; the TSLL option archive is still only 2/3 distinct New York market dates.
A later real overlapping underlying capture may exercise multi-capture operations, but it is not needed to support this cycle's locked rejection.
next: Run one free defined-risk multi-structure discovery across top research symbols using PCS/CCS/IC plus at most one already-simmed under-covered catalog structure, then apply exact B3+B4 and fixed-$0.01-per-leg falsification to every SHIP against non-vacuous dual-cost positive PnL, one-lot max_loss_usd <= $300, window max DD <= $75, and dense-negative windows <= 5; register nothing unless complete gates pass, keep L0/proxy labels, and do not reopen closed families or paper/shadow/arm/live.
